title: alomia stenolepis
intro: Alomia stenolepis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Mexican daisy or Alomia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Alomia stenolepis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and even exhibiting antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Alomia stenolepis are often used in teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
